title: Galtea
description: *Galtea* is a **SaaS platform for AI evaluation and governance** that ensures generative AI models behave correctly, safely, and comply with regulations before deployment.

As a **founding engineer**, I lead front‑end development (dashboard, landing page, blog, documentation, ...) and contributed to the Python SDK and backend while driving key architecture and design decisions.

Built from scratch by a *lean team* and powered by [Barcelona Supercomputing Center’s MareNostrum 5](https://www.bsc.es/marenostrum/marenostrum-5) infrastructure, the platform enables **fast, customizable AI testing** and accelerates safe AI deployment for enterprise clients.
